LanguageData.VoidDeleter.label: Void Deleter
LanguageData.VoidDeleter.description: An archotech-grade spatial disassembler. When active, it instantly demolishes all buildings and objects marked for deconstruction within the selected area, and mines all ores marked for extraction — achieving 100% resource yield. Products are collected by the device and deposited either nearby or directly into the nearest suitable storage zone.
LanguageData.VoidDeleter_mini.label: Void Deleter (Portable)
LanguageData.VoidDeleter_mini.description: An archotech-grade spatial disassembler. When active, it instantly demolishes all buildings and objects marked for deconstruction within the selected area, and mines all ores marked for extraction — achieving 100% resource yield. Products are collected by the device and deposited either nearby or directly into the nearest suitable storage zone.
